movie.actors: Alec Baldwin, John Lone, Penelope Ann Miller, Peter Boyle
movie.genre: Action, Adventure, Crime, Fantasy, Mystery, Thriller
movie.plot: Based on the 1930's pulp fiction and radio drama series, the film pits the hero against his arch enemy, Shiwan Khan, who plans to take over the world by holding a city ransom using an atom bomb. Using his powers of invisibility and "The power to cloud men's minds", the Shadow comes blazing to the city's rescue with explosive results.
movie.title: The Shadow
movie.writer: Walter B. Gibson (character The Shadow from stories), David Koepp
